# Survival Guide
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Survival%20Guide"/]
## Survival Guide
Here you will find all the necessary information about surviving in the Wasteland.
[bold]Section[/bold] [bold]Contents[/bold] [textlink="[bold]Survival Basics[/bold]" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Survival_Basics"/] Food, water, radiation management, and weather protection. The fundamentals every Wasteland survivor needs to know.
